tasks.instruction: Select the lowest-priced family membership that includes at least a 10% discount on classes, choose annual billing, and continue to the payment step after filling in the required contact details.

tasks.instruction: Enroll one 9-year-old child in an after-school drawing program for ages 8–10 that meets on Tuesdays and Thursdays for at least four weeks, costs no more than $150, and add the enrollment to the cart.
